message:
fix(missions): WS guards, double-execution, stale reads, Go body drain (#6828-#6835) (#6843)

* fix(go): drain response body on 422 branch-exists in ShareToGitHub

Eagerly drain the HTTP response body when the GitHub branch creation
returns 422 (branch already exists) so the HTTP/1.1 connection is
returned to the pool immediately instead of waiting for the deferred
Close at function return.

Fixes #6835

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(missions): WS guards, double-execution, stale reads, ref-stabilization

- #6828: Add ref-based guard on handleNext to prevent double-click
  from skipping a wizard phase.
- #6829: Allow appending stream chunks when status is waiting_input
  so out-of-order stream_done doesn't create a split bubble.
- #6831: Persist agent selection to localStorage at send time so a
  connection drop between send and ack doesn't lose the preference.
- #6832: Deduplicate missionsToReconnect by mission ID before
  scheduling reconnection to prevent double wsSend in StrictMode.
- #6833: Wrap bumpUserGeneration in useCallback to prevent cascading
  re-renders from a new function object on every render.
- #6834: Track planningMissionId via a dedicated ref updated
  synchronously at assignment time so askAIForSuggestions never reads
  a stale null from uncommitted state.

Fixes #6828
Fixes #6829
Fixes #6831
Fixes #6832
Fixes #6833
Fixes #6834

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
